info.description: A REST API for E-Logging with authentication, device management, and log tracking.
info.title: E-Logging API

post.description: Creates the initial admin user without authentication. IMPORTANT: Comment out this endpoint after creating your first admin user for security reasons.

400.description: Invalid request body or user already exists

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password and returns JWT tokens
Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive dashboard statistics including logs, stations, operators, and activity data
Retrieves a list of all registered devices (admin only)

post.description: Registers a new device with device fingerprint (admin only)

put.description: Updates device fields using partial updates (admin only)

delete.description: Deactivates a device by ID (admin only)

get.description: Retrieves logs with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination

post.description: Creates a new log entry (requires device fingerprint middleware)

get.description: Exports filtered logs to CSV format

put.description: Updates a log entry. Only the creator can update, and only within 24 hours of creation

get.description: Retrieves all currently active operator sessions

post.description: Creates a new operator session for shift management (admin only)

delete.description: Ends an active operator session (admin only)

get.description: Retrieves all operators currently signed in to a session

post.description: Signs in an operator to an active session

409.description: Operator already signed in or session full

post.description: Signs out an operator from their current session
Create a shift summary with generation station running units and reserve energy

get.description: Get the shift summary associated with a specific operator session
Get all stations with type "Generation" for shift summary creation
Get a shift summary with all generation station details
Retrieves a list of all stations

post.description: Converts audio files to text using OpenAI's Whisper API

get.description: Retrieves a list of all users (admin only)

post.description: Creates a new user with email and password (admin only)

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
